summary: Admin customers loading state correctly displays expected heading and loading indicator. The page properly implements the required loading state from the screen spec, showing appropriate feedback while data loads. No blocking violations against manifesto, postmortem rules, or screen spec requirements detected.

violations.description: Loading state could benefit from more descriptive loading text or skeleton UI to better indicate what content is being loaded
violations.evidence: Generic loading indicator without context-specific messaging

actions: Consider enhancing loading state with more descriptive messaging like 'Loading customers...'
Evaluate if skeleton UI would improve perceived loading performance
